methodsAttempted.query: QS 161-190 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search, targeted HTTP fetches, and official university AI/IT service pages were used across QS161-190.

artifacts.summary: QS161-190 AI tools crawl found official tool-level records for ASU, McMaster, Emory, Ohio State, Queen's Kingston, UCLouvain, Wollongong, VU Amsterdam, NYCU, Queen's Belfast, Freiburg, and Gothenburg. Other universities were not expanded without explicit public tool-level official evidence.

Microsoft 365 Copilot Education Edition Group Buying Project - NYCU IT

stopConditions: Stop after official source-backed tool-level evidence is captured.
Do not expand broad AI guidance into named tool records without explicit tool availability language.

artifacts.title: QS161-190 AI tools crawl report
artifacts.summary: Staged QS161-190 official AI tools records and left universities without explicit tool-level official evidence unexpanded.
limitations: Tool records are tracker-derived metadata and do not replace official university source language.
The pass only expands official public tool-level evidence, not broad AI guidance or generic tool mentions.
